raw_title: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_en: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_zh: 定价、设计与培育——媒体平台化时代公平性规范评估的概念工具
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨在数字媒体平台主导的时代，如何评估媒体是否公平。作者提出了三个概念工具：定价（经济层面）、设计（技术层面）和培育（文化层面），帮助人们从不同角度判断媒体平台的公平性。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how to assess fairness in media during the age of digital platform dominance. The authors propose three conceptual tools: pricing (economic dimension), design (technological dimension), and cultivation (cultural dimension) to help evaluate the fairness of media platforms from different perspectives.
research_direction_zh: 媒体平台化背景下的规范性研究，关注公平性评估的理论框架构建和方法论创新。
research_direction_en: Normative research in the context of media platformization, focusing on theoretical framework construction and methodological innovation for fairness assessment.
